title: Count BST Shapes (Catalan Numbers)
description:
The number of distinct binary search tree shapes with n distinct keys is the n-th Catalan number:
C(n) = C(2n,n) / (n+1)

Compute C(n) modulo 10^9+7.

botCodes.code:
let md=1000000007
let pw a b=let r=ref 1 and a=ref(a mod md) and b=ref b in while !b>0 do if !b land 1=1 then r:= !r * !a mod md;a:= !a * !a mod md;b:= !b asr 1 done;!r
let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let c=ref 1 in for i=0 to n-1 do c:= !c*2 mod md*(2*i+1) mod md*(pw(i+2)(md-2)) mod md done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !c
